assembly_commands.name: ledger-empty-root
assembly_commands.meaning: Merkle Tree Hash for an empty WUCI-LEDGER

assembly_commands.name: ledger-leaf-file
assembly_commands.meaning: Domain-separated WUCI-LEDGER leaf hash for exact entry file bytes

assembly_commands.name: ledger-node
assembly_commands.input: left and right are 64-hex SHA-256 child commitments

format_constraints: Ledger entries are fixed-order label/value lines.
Leaf hashing uses exact entry file bytes, including the final newline.
Internal node inputs are decoded 32-byte hashes, not ASCII hex bytes.
Assembly owns only the hash commitment primitives at this stage.
Python/Zig tooling may orchestrate append, inclusion, and consistency proofs using these primitives.
non_goals: Do not parse publish attestations in assembly in this first ledger step.
Do not accept arbitrary signer material.
Do not replace WUCI-PUBLISH or WUCI-WITNESS verification.
Do not add new secret-bearing crypto.
